testcase.name: Matching filter sequence test
testcase.description: Tests of concept matching filters against sequences where matchAny='true'. Assumes that non-sequential matching works as these tests only check sequence behaviour.

variation.name: Concept sequence match test. Three single facts with concepts that match second a fact contained in a sequence
variation.description: Expecected result is 3 output facts, as each input fact concept will always match against a concept in the sequence

variation.name: Concept sequence match test. Three single facts, of which two have concepts that match a second fact contained in a sequence
variation.description: Expected result is 2 output facts, as only 2 input fact concepts will match against a concept in the sequence, due to complementing concept filter

variation.name: Concept sequence complement match test. Three single facts, one of which has a concept that does not match any facts in a sequence
variation.description: As previous case but with complementing match filter. Produces 1 output fact for the fact that does not match, due to the matching filter being complemented
